isi.lyrics:
Lyric Scon - 너에게 반해 (Crush on you)

Romanization

neoege tto banhae
maeil saeroun neol bone
moreugesseo bamsae
ne maeumi eotteolji saenggakhae bwado

Don't know what you just think of me babe
nan neoman bomyeon tto seolleneunde
gateun maeumilkka gunggeumhamyeonseo
jogeum museowo anilkka bwa

uri dureul hwanhi bichwojuneun byeolbit arae
duri jabeun soni tteollyeooneun sigan soge
gobaekhae jullae hanggeoreum dagawa jullae

Cause I don’t know what you think
Cause I don’t know who you love

eoduun bamhaneul arae hamkke
naedinneun ne balgeoreum soriga
nae maeumeul ullyeo neol chyeodabol su eopge hae
oneuldo nan neoege banhae

Don't know what you just think of me babe
nan neoman bomyeon tto seolleneunde
gateun maeumilkka gunggeumhamyeonseo
jogeum museowo anilkka bwa

uri dureul hwanhi bichwojuneun byeolbit arae
duri jabeun soni tteollyeooneun sigan soge
gobaekhae jullae hanggeoreum dagawa jullae

uri seoro mani bogo sipeojil geunare
kkoil daero kkoin jichin narui majimage
hamkkehae jullae nae maeumeul wirohae jullae

Cause I don’t know what you think
Cause I don’t know who you love


Hangeul

너에게 또 반해
매일 새로운 널 보네
모르겠어 밤새
네 마음이 어떨지 생각해 봐도

Don't know what you just think of me babe
난 너만 보면 또 설레는데
같은 마음일까 궁금하면서
조금 무서워 아닐까 봐

우리 둘을 환히 비춰주는 별빛 아래
둘이 잡은 손이 떨려오는 시간 속에
고백해 줄래 한걸음 다가와 줄래

Cause I don’t know what you think
Cause I don’t know who you love

어두운 밤하늘 아래 함께
내딛는 네 발걸음 소리가
내 마음을 울려 널 쳐다볼 수 없게 해
오늘도 난 너에게 반해

Don't know what you just think of me babe
난 너만 보면 또 설레는데
같은 마음일까 궁금하면서
조금 무서워 아닐까 봐

우리 둘을 환히 비춰주는 별빛 아래
둘이 잡은 손이 떨려오는 시간 속에
고백해 줄래 한걸음 다가와 줄래

우리 서로 많이 보고 싶어질 그날에
꼬일 대로 꼬인 지친 날의 마지막에
함께해 줄래 내 마음을 위로해 줄래

Cause I don’t know what you think
Cause I don’t know who you love

isi.lyrics:
Lyric heyden - My End.

Romanization

It’s never the same, oh, I
It’s never the same, oh, I

It’s never the same, oh, I
It’s not like the first time,
I’ve been chasing that high for life
I’m falling apart when you told me you’re done
I need something to fill my life
something to do me nice

Yeah, every night I’ve been chasing that high
knowing it’s taking my whole damn life

sniffing all those lines after lines
ain’t nobody ever saving your life
And we know
Ain’t nobody trying to navigate
They’re just trying to get another line

ain’t nobody gonna change my heart
ain’t nobody gonna change your heart
They’ll be in the same dark room
sniffing lines after lines
You know only you can save yourself

I’ll be on the other side
I’m tired of being a night owl
I don’t wanna waste my life

I’m falling apart when you told me you’re done
I need something to fill my life
something to do me nice

You told me to stop
when I’m falling apart
And we both know it’s way too late

Every night I’ve been chasing that high
knowing it’s taking my whole damn life
I’m falling apart when you told me you’re done
I need something to fill my life

sniffing all those lines after lines

ain’t nobody gonna change my heart

isi.albums: 상흔과 치유의 블렌드 (A Blend of Scars and Healing)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric roon - Bitter,sweet

Romanization

hamkke isseul ttaeboda
honja neol gidarineun sigani joa, nan

gakkeumeun eorisukhage baetneun yokdo
yuyakhan pyojeong dwie kkachilhan sok
naman aneun geureon neoui bulpyeonhami
nan jom deo

Bitter, sweet yeoreumgwa jamdeulgi jeon sai
gidarimi naega neol saranghaneun bangsik
Bitter, sweet mundeuk majuchin uisik sai
simbiham, geu maeumi nege dagikkaji

tto chakgakhaji mayo, Baby
dareun aerangeun bigyo marajwo
inggi itdan jyaedeulboda
negeman utgo isseo

nuga mworaedo bakkuji anneun otdo
uulhan nae gomin yaegien hapum
neoman dalli boneun isanghan sesangi
nan deo, deo

Bitter, sweet yeoreumgwa jamdeulgi jeon sai
gidarimi naega neol saranghaneun bangsik
Bitter, sweet mundeuk majuchin uisik sai
simbiham, geu maeumi nege dagikkaji


Hangeul

함께 있을 때보다
혼자 널 기다리는 시간이 좋아, 난

가끔은 어리숙하게 뱉는 욕도
유약한 표정 뒤에 까칠한 속
나만 아는 그런 너의 불편함이
난 좀 더

Bitter, sweet 여름과 잠들기 전 사이
기다림이 내가 널 사랑하는 방식
Bitter, sweet 문득 마주친 의식 사이
신비함, 그 마음이 네게 닿기까지

또 착각하지 마요, Baby
다른 애랑은 비교 말아줘
인기 있단 쟤들보다
네게만 웃고 있어

누가 뭐래도 바꾸지 않는 옷도
우울한 내 고민 얘기엔 하품
너만 달리 보는 이상한 세상이
난 더, 더

Bitter, sweet 여름과 잠들기 전 사이
기다림이 내가 널 사랑하는 방식
Bitter, sweet 문득 마주친 의식 사이
신비함, 그 마음이 네게 닿기까지

isi.albums: 상흔과 치유의 블렌드 (A Blend of Scars and Healing)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric roon - 나를 깨워주는 해 같은 건 없어 (You Could Never Be My Sun)

Romanization

nal haengbokhage mandeulji mayo
geudae eopseojil
nareul wae baeryeohaji anayo

modeun geol da chaewojugo
seoromaneul jikyeojumyeon
heojeonhameul sasildeureul
da araya hajana

neomu jakgo hachaneun juje
mwot molla jamsi haengbokhaenne
gajin sarangeul akkil sae eopsi
teong bieojineun nare
urin janinhaejil geoya

uri haengbokhage haejuji mayo
yunando malgo geunyang isseoyo
utgiji aneum utjido malgo
jayeonseureopge isseojwoyo

eodigado amu binjari eopge
jachaegina seulpeumdo eopge
amugeotdo neukkil su eopge
eoduun bameman mannayo

neomu jakgo hachaneun juje
mwot molla jamsi haengbokhaenne
gajin sarangeul akkil sae eopsi
teong bieojineun nare
urin janinhaejil geoya

(nuga geureogo sipgesseo)
(nuga geureogo sipdaesseo)
bangsimhaji anado sarangeun ppajyeoyo
(neoneun neomu jogesseo)
(geumbang ijeobeorimyeonseo)
meotjin mareul swipgedo naebaeteo


Hangeul

날 행복하게 만들지 마요
그대 없어질
나를 왜 배려하지 않아요

모든 걸 다 채워주고
서로만을 지켜주면
허전함을 사실들을
다 알아야 하잖아

너무 작고 하찮은 주제
뭣 몰라 잠시 행복했네
가진 사랑을 아낄 새 없이
텅 비어지는 날에
우린 잔인해질 거야

우리 행복하게 해주지 마요
유난도 말고 그냥 있어요
웃기지 않음 웃지도 말고
자연스럽게 있어줘요

어디가도 아무 빈자리 없게
자책이나 슬픔도 없게
아무것도 느낄 수 없게
어두운 밤에만 만나요

너무 작고 하찮은 주제
뭣 몰라 잠시 행복했네
가진 사랑을 아낄 새 없이
텅 비어지는 날에
우린 잔인해질 거야

(누가 그러고 싶겠어)
(누가 그러고 싶댔어)
방심하지 않아도 사랑은 빠져요
(너는 너무 좋겠어)
(금방 잊어버리면서)
멋진 말을 쉽게도 내뱉어

isi.albums: 상흔과 치유의 블렌드 (A Blend of Scars and Healing)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric roon - 남의 화단 (A Flower Bed)

Romanization

da kkumiran mareun haji mayo
hanado banggapji ana
geu jallan saenggak

eojedo nan amu sori mot hago
neoui chakhan cheogeul gamsanghago
honja tto banseonghaeyo
igeon da soyong inna bwa

amureoji anke jaran gasie
jaldo jjillyeo naneun kkori joa boyeo
oneuldo jal gakkwojin
namui hwadaneul boreo ga
igeon da soyong isseo


Hangeul

다 꿈이란 말은 하지 마요
하나도 반갑지 않아
그 잘난 생각

어제도 난 아무 소리 못 하고
너의 착한 척을 감상하고
혼자 또 반성해요
이건 다 소용 있나 봐

아무렇지 않게 자란 가시에
잘도 찔려 나는 꼴이 좋아 보여
오늘도 잘 가꿔진
남의 화단을 보러 가
이건 다 소용 있어

isi.albums: 상흔과 치유의 블렌드 (A Blend of Scars and Healing)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric roon - 미안한 애 (Your Apology)

Romanization

wollae soljikhan geon eoryeowo
dadeul geureoge bigeophaejina bwa
geuraeseoinji nan
eonjebuteongga
neoege japhyeotji geureoge

jal haejugoneun itjiman
ne meoritsogen ttan saenggagi neomuna mana
1buteo 10kkaji da ttajyeodeundamyeon
imido seongchi aneun nae maeumman
deo dachil tende

nappeuji aneuryeoda
chakhajido mothae neon
byeok jom chyeojullae yeope
naega deo mot dagagage
dajeonghan geon joega dwae
apeundedo eoneusae
nan mianhan aega doegil jacheohae

ireogerado gyeoteseo
neol ikgo sipeo
gajeun aesseo bwado
neon da algo isseo
heotdoen yoksimgwa gidaee
eotteoge haeya halji

mangseorineun cheok hajiman
neon nareumdaero jeonghae noeun dabi itjana
soljikhi tuk kkanogin jogeum museowo
eokjiro nal wihaneun geon geumandwo
babo gatjana

nappeuji aneuryeoda
chakhajido mothae neon
byeok jom chyeojullae yeope
naega deo mot dagagage
dajeonghan geon joega dwae
apeundedo eoneusae
nan mianhan aega doegil jacheohae

jamkkan seuchin sigani
naege wa hwicheongine
eojjeomyeon, eojjeomyeon saenggakhae
igeon ama


Hangeul

원래 솔직한 건 어려워
다들 그렇게 비겁해지나 봐
그래서인지 난
언제부턴가
너에게 잡혔지 그렇게

잘 해주고는 있지만
네 머릿속엔 딴 생각이 너무나 많아
1부터 10까지 다 따져든다면
이미도 성치 않은 내 마음만
더 다칠 텐데

나쁘지 않으려다
착하지도 못해 넌
벽 좀 쳐줄래 옆에
내가 더 못 다가가게
다정한 건 죄가 돼
아픈데도 어느새
난 미안한 애가 되길 자처해

이렇게라도 곁에서
널 읽고 싶어
갖은 애써 봐도
넌 다 알고 있어
헛된 욕심과 기대에
어떻게 해야 할지

망설이는 척 하지만
넌 나름대로 정해 놓은 답이 있잖아
솔직히 툭 까놓긴 조금 무서워
억지로 날 위하는 건 그만둬
바보 같잖아

나쁘지 않으려다
착하지도 못해 넌
벽 좀 쳐줄래 옆에
내가 더 못 다가가게
다정한 건 죄가 돼
아픈데도 어느새
난 미안한 애가 되길 자처해

잠깐 스친 시간이
내게 와 휘청이네
어쩌면, 어쩌면 생각해
이건 아마
isi.lyrics_timestamp:
원래 솔직한 건 어려워
다들 그렇게 비겁해지나 봐
그래서인지 난
언제부턴가
너에게 잡혔지 그렇게

잘 해주고는 있지만
네 머릿속엔 딴 생각이 너무나 많아
1부터 10까지 다 따져든다면
이미도 성치 않은 내 마음만
더 다칠 텐데

착하지도 못해 넌
벽 좀 쳐줄래 옆에

다정한 건 죄가 돼
아픈데도 어느새

이렇게라도 곁에서
널 읽고 싶어

isi.albums: 상흔과 치유의 블렌드 (A Blend of Scars and Healing)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric roon - 멍 (Bruised)

Romanization

malhal himdo eopseo na
sasohan geotdeureda
maeumeul da bachyeosseo
machi tto jahaecheoreom

apatdeon naldeureda
ne mareul jeojanghaesseo
geoteuron useotjiman
sogeun da tabeoryeosseo
machi neon bulssi gata
eojjeomyeon

nalgaseodo sarajiji anneun ge isseo
useuwojin nae haedabeun
ne bal mite inneun geol
meolli nal gidarigo inneun geol
deo ppareuge dagagane

ijen nado nega malhan sarami dwaesseo
hansimhago amu pyojeong eomneun
inhyeong gateun geol
yeoksi neon ttokttokhago museowo
gwisincheoreom

nae mameun joega dwaesseo
nayakhago biruhan
sombari chagawojyeo
machi tto joeincheoreom

eojjeol su eopseunikka
da gotongeun itjana
meongcheonghan hoeyujocha
deureul suga eopseo deo
machi neon cheonggugingga bwa
eojjeomyeon

nalgaseodo sarajiji anneun ge isseo
useuwojin nae haedabeun
ne bal mite inneun geol
meolli nal gidarigo inneun geol
deo ppareuge dagagane

ijen nado nega malhan sarami dwaesseo
hansimhago amu pyojeong eomneun
inhyeong gateun geol
yeoksi neon ttokttokhago museowo
gwisincheoreom


Hangeul

말할 힘도 없어 나
사소한 것들에다
마음을 다 바쳤어
마치 또 자해처럼

아팠던 날들에다
네 말을 저장했어
겉으론 웃었지만
속은 다 타버렸어
마치 넌 불씨 같아
어쩌면

낡아서도 사라지지 않는 게 있어
우스워진 내 해답은
네 발 밑에 있는 걸
멀리 날 기다리고 있는 걸
더 빠르게 다가가네

이젠 나도 네가 말한 사람이 됐어
한심하고 아무 표정 없는
인형 같은 걸
역시 넌 똑똑하고 무서워
귀신처럼

내 맘은 죄가 됐어
나약하고 비루한
손발이 차가워져
마치 또 죄인처럼

어쩔 수 없으니까
다 고통은 있잖아
멍청한 회유조차
들을 수가 없어 더
마치 넌 천국인가 봐
어쩌면

낡아서도 사라지지 않는 게 있어
우스워진 내 해답은
네 발 밑에 있는 걸
멀리 날 기다리고 있는 걸
더 빠르게 다가가네

이젠 나도 네가 말한 사람이 됐어
한심하고 아무 표정 없는
인형 같은 걸
역시 넌 똑똑하고 무서워
귀신처럼

isi.lyrics:
Lyric roon - 첫 악몽 (The First Nightmare)

Romanization

du baldo eopsi eotteoge
nareul jjochaoneun geoni?
nuga neol naegero bonaen geolkka?
deureodo moreul daedabeul gidaryeo

eum, eum
cheomen baega gopeun jul arasseo
neon saramdo jabameokdeorago
gieokhae, cheot mannam neoui eolgul
2025nyeonui jigeumdo

dallyeoganeun namjaui deung wie
jimman doel ppunin eorin na hana
bummyeong kkumieotjiman
geu bamui museoumeun
da keun jigeumui hyeonsilboda deo keo

eum, eum
eotteon kkumeun mueopboda saengsaenghae
eotteon nareun kkumbodado gajja gatjana
mideojijin anado
2006nyeon eoneu yeoreum bam
seoneulhan nae bang

du baldo eopsi eotteoge
nareul jjochaoneun geoni
nuga neol naegero bonaen geolkka?
deureodo moreul daedabeul gidaryeo


Hangeul

두 발도 없이 어떻게
나를 쫓아오는 거니?
누가 널 내게로 보낸 걸까?
들어도 모를 대답을 기다려

음, 음
첨엔 배가 고픈 줄 알았어
넌 사람도 잡아먹더라고
기억해, 첫 만남 너의 얼굴
2025년의 지금도

달려가는 남자의 등 위에
짐만 될 뿐인 어린 나 하나
분명 꿈이었지만
그 밤의 무서움은
다 큰 지금의 현실보다 더 커

음, 음
어떤 꿈은 무엇보다 생생해
어떤 날은 꿈보다도 가짜 같잖아
믿어지진 않아도
2006년 어느 여름 밤
서늘한 내 방

isi.lyrics:
Lyric add9 - By My Side

Romanization

Ceiling fan turning slow above us
Lazy light across your face
Nothing special nothing fancy
Still my favorite kind of day
Your sneakers tapping to the rhythm
Of a song I barely know
Funny how the smallest moments
Make me never wanna go
Stay by my side
Through the quiet through the noise
Every step every mile
You’re the reason for my voice
No big lights no crowded nights
Just you and I
Everything feels right
When you’re by my side
Bus rides staring out the window
Tracing shapes up in the sky
Talking about the years ahead
Like we’ve got all the time
Your head resting on my shoulder
Heartbeat steady close to mine
Never thought a simple touch
Could rearrange my life
Stay by my side
Through the morning through the blue
Every road every turn
Leads me back to you
No more doubts no looking down
No need to hide
Home is anywhere
You’re by my side
Stay by my side
Even when the days feel long
We don’t need a perfect world
We already belong
If tomorrow calls my name
I’ll be alright
All I ever want
Is you by my side

Hangeul

isi.lyrics:
Lyric add9 - Slowly

Romanization

Warm night air drifting through the door
Your shoes left by the bed
TV light across your face
Soft colors blue and red
Nothing big is happening
Still I don’t wanna move
Every quiet second here
Feels better next to you
Slowly
My heart is leaning your way
Like shadows chasing the sunset
Fading into gray
Hold me
Like we got nowhere to be
All of my life is changing
Slowly with you and me
Long talks under streetlight glow
Counting stars we barely see
Tracing circles on your hand
You drawing shapes on me
We don’t need a perfect line
We don’t need a plan
Every little step we take
Just lands where it began
Slowly
Every breath feels so new
Like the tide keeps pulling
Pulling me to you
Easy
Like falling half asleep
Every moment with you
Is one I wanna keep
Slowly
Days turn into years
Every laugh every touch
Melting all my fears
Stay here
Right where we should be
If love has any meaning
It’s you right here with me

Hangeul

isi.lyrics:
Lyric add9 - Next To Me

Romanization

Curtains moving with the breeze
Dust and sunlight in the air
Your sleepy voice saying my name
Like a song without a care
We don’t rush the ticking clock
Let the morning drift and be
Every little ordinary
Turns to gold when you’re with me
Right next to me
That’s where you’re meant to be
Closer than the air I breathe
Easy as a memory
No wild dreams no grand scene
Nothing fancy to see
Life just feels complete
When you’re right next to me
Corner store and midnight walks
Sharing stories half awake
Laughing over stupid jokes
Every promise that we make
World keeps spinning fast outside
But we move in our own speed
All I ever really wanted
Was this simple thing we keep
Right next to me
Everything falls into place
Every shadow disappears
When I see your face
No more chasing anything
No need to run free
All I need is you
Right next to me
Right next to me
Through the dark through the light
Every road every turn
Leads me back each night
If forever’s just a word
Still it feels so sweet
Every day begins
With you next to me

Hangeul

isi.lyrics:
Lyric add9 - Smile

Romanization

Late train humming through the city lights
Your hand brushing over mine
Talking slow about nothing much
Still it feels like the perfect night
Every street we cross together
Feels a little more like home
Never knew a simple moment
Could turn my heart to gold
I like the way you smile
Like the sun after the rain
Every little look you give
Takes away the pain
Don’t need words don’t need signs
Don’t need anything new
All my days feel right
Just walking next to you
Coffee cups and window seats
Drawing shapes upon the glass
Laughing at the smallest things
Hoping time won’t move too fast
When the world gets loud and heavy
You’re the quiet that I choose
Every road I take somehow
leads me back to you
I like the way you smile
How it pulls me closer still
Like a song stuck in my head
That I never wanna kill
No big dreams no grand plans
Nothing left to prove
All I ever want
Is a life with you
I like the way you smile
Makes the dark turn into blue
Every morning every night
Starts and ends with you
If forever’s just a word
Then let it all be true
Every breath I take
I’m falling into you

Hangeul

isi.lyrics:
Lyric add9 - Where You Are

Romanization

Streetlights drawing lines on the floor
Midnight air against my skin
Every step I take feels lighter
Ever since you let me in
Nothing loud nothing perfect
Just the way you say my name
All the days I used to wander
Never feel the same
Where you are
That’s where my heart goes
Like a river running home
Only you it knows
Every night every star
Leading from the dark
All I ever need
Is right where you are
Coffee getting cold between us
Laughing at the smallest things
Windows open summer breathing
Softly like the breeze it sings
We don’t talk about forever
Still it’s written in your eyes
All the quiet little moments
Feel bigger than the sky
Where you are
Time is moving slow
Every shadow disappears
When you’re close enough to hold
No more far
No more missing parts
Every road I take
Ends where you are
Where you are
That’s my only place
Every dream I ever had
Has your face
Near or far
I don’t need a map
All my life keeps turning
Back to where you are

Hangeul

All my life keeps turning

isi.lyrics:
Lyric add9 - Falling Easy

Romanization

Soft light shining through your window
Every little thing feels simple
Didn’t know my heart could open
This fast this real with you
Every word you say is lighter
Pulling me a little higher
Like the world just found its color
Every time you move
I’m falling easy into you
Like it’s something I was made to do
Every second feels brand new
When I’m with you
All the days I couldn’t see
Turn to something clear in me
Now I know just where I need
To be with you
To be with you
Coffee cups and conversations
Turning into little moments
Every glance is like a promise
I don’t wanna lose
Even silence feels like music
In your arms I feel the truth
Like my heart just found a rhythm
Only made for you
I’m falling easy into you
Like it’s something I was made to do
Every second feels brand new
When I’m with you
All the days I couldn’t see
Turn to something clear in me
Now I know just where I need
To be with you
Maybe I was always waiting
For a love that felt like saving
All the parts I couldn’t face before
Now I don’t need hesitation
You’re my only destination
All I know is I want more
Stay with me don’t let it go
This is all I need to know
Every feeling starts to grow
When I’m with you
If forever feels this right
I don’t need another light
All I ever wanna find
Is me and you

Hangeul

isi.lyrics:
Lyric add9 - Just Us Two

Romanization

Golden light across your eyes
Little sparks I can’t disguise
Didn’t know a simple day
Could feel like paradise
Every laugh you give to me
Feels like where I wanna be
All the noise just fades away
When you’re close to me
It’s just us two
In a world so new
Every little thing we do
Feels like love
It’s just us here
Everything so clear
I don’t need another place
When you’re near
Sidewalk stories late at night
Holding on so soft and tight
Every second passing by
Feels perfectly right
Even when we say nothing
I can hear the way you breathe
In your arms I find a dream
I don’t wanna leave
It’s just us two
In a world so new
Every little thing we do
Feels like love
It’s just us here
Everything so clear
I don’t need another place
When you’re near
Maybe this was always waiting
All the time we spent just fading
Now it all just leads me straight to you
Every moment feels like magic
Nothing here is automatic
All I know is I don’t wanna lose
Stay with me
Don’t let go
This is all I need to know
Every night
Every day
I just wanna feel this way

Hangeul

isi.lyrics:
Lyric add9 - Right On Time

Romanization

Morning glow across your face
Everything just falls in place
Didn’t know a love like this
Could arrive without a trace
Every step just feels aligned
Like you’ve always been in mind
All the days I left behind
Lead me into you
You came right on time
Like a rhythm in my mind
Every beat just feels so right
When I’m with you
You came right on cue
Like a dream I never knew
Every color breaking through
Feels so true
Late night talks and quiet streets
Every glance and every beat
All the world just disappears
When you’re standing next to me
Even silence feels alive
Like a spark I can’t deny
In your arms I realize
What my heart can do
You came right on time
Like a rhythm in my mind
Every beat just feels so right
When I’m with you
You came right on cue
Like a dream I never knew
Every color breaking through
Feels so true
I don’t need a reason why
All I know is you and I
Turn the ordinary into something new
Every second feels so clear
Like I found what I was near
All I ever needed was you
Stay a little longer now
Don’t ask me the reason how
All I know is here with you
Feels like home
If the night just slips away
I would still choose you the same
Every moment that we make
Is our own

Hangeul

isi.lyrics:
Lyric add9 - YOUTH

Romanization

We were running through the city lights
Laughing like we’d never lose the night
Every second felt like we could fly
Didn’t care about the morning
All the worries fading out of sight
All we had was you and I
In your eyes I saw a life
I didn’t know was waiting
This is our youth
We don’t need a reason
Dancing in the truth
Every changing season
We don’t slow down
Even when it’s over
I just wanna stay
In this moment closer
Every corner holds a memory
Every breath feels like a melody
All the nights we couldn’t fall asleep
Just to keep this going
Even if the world is moving fast
I just want this feeling to last
Every second slipping through my hands
But I keep on holding
This is our youth
We don’t need a reason
Dancing in the truth
Every changing season
We don’t slow down
Even when it’s over
I just wanna stay
In this moment closer
Maybe time will take us somewhere
Different roads and different air
But I know we’ll always have
This part of us
Every laugh and every fall
Every moment gave it all
If I had to choose again
I’d choose us

Hold me in this endless light
Like we’ll never say goodbye
Even when the days go by
We were something real
If this fades into a dream
You’re the best I’ve ever seen
All I know is you and me
That’s what youth feels

Hangeul

isi.lyrics:
Lyric add9 - Spring With You

Romanization

Windows open let it in
Warm air on your skin
Cherry blossoms falling slow
Like we’re standing in a scene
I was frozen for a while
Cold heart winter style
Then you smiled and everything
Started changing now
Feels like spring with you
Sky turning baby blue
Every little thing you do
Makes me bloom brand new
Feels like spring with you
Like my dreams came true
If love’s a season
I’m I’m stuck on you
Coffee dates in morning light
Laughing way too bright
Every step beside you
Feels like something right
I was used to grey
Clouds that wouldn’t move
Now the sun is breaking through
Every time you do
Feels like spring with you
Sky turning baby blue
Every little thing you do
Makes me bloom brand new
Feels like spring with you
Like my dreams came true
If love’s a season
I’m I’m stuck on you
If the rain comes down
We’ll just run through it
If the wind blows hard
We’ll lean into it
No more winter in my chest
You’re my best
Now it’s always spring
Every little thing
Every time you say my name
Flowers start to sing
No more cold nights through
All I see is you
If forever feels this way
Let it stay
I’m stuck on you
